text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Abdominal examination: Abdomen is palpable, no abdominal pain, no palpable masses in the abdomen.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Peristalsis present, Blumberg negative.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Giordano negative.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Bowel function and diuresis within normal limits.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Pain on paraspinous palpation and lumbar spine movements, lumbar paravertebral muscle contracture, Lasègue PERSONS_NAME, Blumberg negative Lower limb deep tendon reflexes within normal limits.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Tactile sensitivity of lower limbs preserved.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "No lower limb stenosis deficits.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "No saddle deficit.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Warm and perfused skin on lower limbs, peripheral pulses present, symmetrical, and within normal limits.", 0.0, 0.1)
